headline: New in Deep Agents v0.6
subject: 🚨 AI Alert: 2 new launches — LangChain Blog, GitHub Blog

article_items.title: New in Deep Agents v0.6
article_items.description: Deep Agents 0.6 ships a code interpreter, harness profiles, streaming v3, delta channels, and ContextHub, making agents faster, cheaper, and more scalable.
article_items.excerpt: Deep Agents 0.6 ships a code interpreter, harness profiles, streaming v3, delta channels, and ContextHub, making agents faster, cheaper, and more scalable.

article_items.title: Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere
article_items.description: Kick off work in VS Code or the CLI, finish it from your phone. Remote control for GitHub Copilot sessions is now generally available.
article_items.excerpt: Kick off work in VS Code or the CLI, finish it from your phone. Remote control for GitHub Copilot sessions is now generally available.
